name: Presto Cash Gold Pawn Shop
description_short: Presto Cash Pawn is an established Miami pawn shop operating since 1990, offering collateral-based loans and buying/selling of jewelry, electronics, and other merchandise.
description_long:
Presto Cash Pawn has operated in the Miami area for over three decades, establishing itself as a long-standing pawn shop business. The company is located at 3348 Coral Way in the Coral Way neighborhood of Miami, FL, within Miami-Dade County, and maintains a physical storefront for customer transactions.

The business offers traditional pawn shop services including collateral loans, purchasing of used merchandise, and retail sales of pre-owned items. Based on their service tags and industry categorization, they deal in jewelry (gold, diamonds, estate pieces), electronics, tools and equipment, and other used goods. The company also appears to offer check cashing and cash advance services typical of pawn operations.

As one of the longer-established pawn shops in the Miami market, Presto Cash Pawn has been in continuous operation since 1990, suggesting business stability and local market familiarity. The business is listed alongside other Miami-area pawn shops, competing in a crowded local market that includes establishments like Midtown Pawn and Exchange, LA Estrella DE Oro Twenty, and Real Cash 2.

The listing provides limited detail about specific loan terms, interest rates, or operational policies. No customer reviews are visible on the platform, and the company has not claimed or verified their business listing, which may indicate lower engagement with online reputation management. Potential customers should contact the business directly at (305) 529-5021 for specific information about loan amounts, rates, and acceptable collateral.
pros: Established in 1990 with 30+ years of operational history in Miami market
Physical storefront location at accessible Coral Way address
Handles diverse collateral types including jewelry, electronics, and tools
Direct phone contact available at (305) 529-5021 for inquiries
Long-term presence suggests familiarity with local customer base and inventory sourcing
cons: No verified customer reviews available on the business listing platform
Company has not claimed or updated their listing, limiting transparency
Specific loan terms, APR rates, and maximum loan amounts not disclosed on profile
No online presence or website with service details provided beyond Hubbiz directory entry
No information about loan processing time, approval criteria, or redemption policies
best_for: Miami residents needing quick cash against personal assets or jewelry
People buying pre-owned jewelry, electronics, or tools at discounted prices
Borrowers unable to qualify for traditional bank loans seeking collateral-based alternatives
diagnosis: Best for Miami residents needing immediate liquidity by pledging personal valuables like jewelry or electronics as collateral, or shoppers seeking discounted pre-owned items. Main caveat: the company's online presence is minimal with no verified reviews or disclosed terms; borrowers should call directly to confirm current rates, loan limits, and redemption periods before committing collateral.
services: Diamond jewelry and estate jewelry transactions
